title: croton glabellus
intro: Croton glabellus, also known as Croton lechleri or Dragon's Blood, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, characterized by its red sap and medicinal properties. The plant's sap has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, ulcers, and gastrointestinal problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton glabellus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect the stomach lining, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Croton glabellus include its sap, which is often sold as a dietary supplement or used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
